verses.text: 'Present your bodies a living sacrifice'; 'be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind.' True worship. Holiness flows from a renewed mind.
'Present your bodies a living sacrifice'; 'be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind.' True worship. Holiness flows from a renewed mind.
Think soberly, for 'we... are one body in Christ, and every one members one of another.' One body. Each believer has a place and a part.
Think soberly, for 'we... are one body in Christ, and every one members one of another.' One body. Each believer has a place and a part.
Think soberly, for 'we... are one body in Christ, and every one members one of another.' One body. Each believer has a place and a part.
Having differing gifts, use them, in prophecy, teaching, giving, and ruling. Varied service. Every gift is to be used for the body's good.
Having differing gifts, use them, in prophecy, teaching, giving, and ruling. Varied service. Every gift is to be used for the body's good.
Having differing gifts, use them, in prophecy, teaching, giving, and ruling. Varied service. Every gift is to be used for the body's good.
Let love be 'without dissimulation'; 'in honour preferring one another.' Sincere love. True affection seeks the other's honour.
Let love be 'without dissimulation'; 'in honour preferring one another.' Sincere love. True affection seeks the other's honour.
Fervent in spirit, 'serving the Lord'; rejoicing in hope, patient in trouble, given to hospitality. Diligent devotion. The Christian life is warm and active.
Fervent in spirit, 'serving the Lord'; rejoicing in hope, patient in trouble, given to hospitality. Diligent devotion. The Christian life is warm and active.
Fervent in spirit, 'serving the Lord'; rejoicing in hope, patient in trouble, given to hospitality. Diligent devotion. The Christian life is warm and active.
Bless your persecutors; 'rejoice with them that do rejoice, and weep with them that weep.' Shared feeling. Love enters into others' joys and griefs.
Bless your persecutors; 'rejoice with them that do rejoice, and weep with them that weep.' Shared feeling. Love enters into others' joys and griefs.
Bless your persecutors; 'rejoice with them that do rejoice, and weep with them that weep.' Shared feeling. Love enters into others' joys and griefs.
Recompense no evil for evil; 'avenge not yourselves... Vengeance is mine... saith the Lord.' Leave it to God. We need not repay; God will judge.
Recompense no evil for evil; 'avenge not yourselves... Vengeance is mine... saith the Lord.' Leave it to God. We need not repay; God will judge.
Recompense no evil for evil; 'avenge not yourselves... Vengeance is mine... saith the Lord.' Leave it to God. We need not repay; God will judge.
If thine enemy hunger, feed him; 'be not overcome of evil, but overcome evil with good.' Conquering love. Kindness defeats the evil it meets.
